notes: 3.10.95 — HRM PHONG BAN MOT NGUON SU THAT (fix 'double phong', map Sep chot 12/07): emp.dept chuyen sang MA danh muc S.departments (nhu Ma FAST ben kho). (1) hrDeptCanon(text->MA: khop code/name/khong dau + bang alias lich su: PTKD->TMHD, Hang Hai->QLT, Ky thuat va Van hanh->BDA, Chuyen gia O&M->OM, BGD/Ban Giam Doc->BOD, Doi tau->trong) + hrDeptLabel(MA->ten). (2) Migration 2 buoc Console admin: hrmMigrateDeptPreview() xem bang doi + danh sach khong khop, hrmMigrateDeptApply() ghi + audit — idempotent. (3) Form NV: input tu do -> SELECT bat buoc tu danh muc (luu MA, option trong cho crew/expert). (4) Import Excel canon ve MA danh muc that; HRM_DEPTS cung LOAI khoi code. (5) Group/thong ke (hrmRenderDash byDept + danh sach NV dang lam viec + bang) theo MA, nhan = 'MA · Ten'. Test 14/14 (du bien the map Sep + khong khop giu nguyen + idempotent). Trinh tu Sep: backup -> hrmMigrateDeptPreview() -> hrmMigrateDeptApply(). Bao gom 3.10.42-94. Rollback=3.10.41.
